testcase.name: test_analyze_comments
test_download_company_csv

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'linkedin_company_employees.csv' in 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv' + where 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv' = <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})>('content-disposition', '') + where <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})> = Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}).get + where Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}) = <Response [200 OK]>.headers

testcase.failure:
client = <starlette.testclient.TestClient object at 0x000001BE5CC908E0>
def test_download_company_csv(client): with patch("app.routers.company_scraper.get_driver") as mock_driver_cls, \ patch("app.routers.company_scraper.login_to_linkedin") as mock_login, \ patch("app.routers.company_scraper.scrape_companies_logic") as mock_scrape, \ patch("app.routers.company_scraper.generate_csv_stream") as mock_csv:
mock_driver_cls.return_value.__enter__.return_value = MagicMock() mock_login.return_value = True mock_scrape.return_value = [] mock_csv.return_value = iter([b"col1\n", b"val1\n"])
response = client.get("/scraper/companies/download?keywords=test&email=test@example.com&password=password")
assert response.status_code == 200 assert response.headers.get("content-type") == "text/csv; charset=utf-8" > assert "linkedin_company_employees.csv" in response.headers.get("content-disposition", "") E AssertionError: assert 'linkedin_company_employees.csv' in 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv' E + where 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv' = <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})>('content-disposition', '') E + where <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})> = Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}).get E + where Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_companies_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}) = <Response [200 OK]>.headers
tests\test_company_scraper.py:35: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_download_group_csv

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'linkedin_group_members.csv' in 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv' + where 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv' = <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})>('content-disposition', '') + where <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})> = Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}).get + where Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}) = <Response [200 OK]>.headers

testcase.failure:
client = <starlette.testclient.TestClient object at 0x000001BE5CDAE200>
def test_download_group_csv(client): with patch("app.routers.group_scraper.get_driver") as mock_driver_cls, \ patch("app.routers.group_scraper.login_to_linkedin") as mock_login, \ patch("app.routers.group_scraper.scrape_group_members_logic") as mock_scrape, \ patch("app.routers.group_scraper.generate_csv_stream") as mock_csv:
mock_driver_cls.return_value.__enter__.return_value = MagicMock() mock_login.return_value = True mock_scrape.return_value = [] mock_csv.return_value = iter([b"col1\n", b"val1\n"])
response = client.get("/scraper/group-members/download?group_url=https://linkedin.com/groups/123&email=test@example.com&password=password")
assert response.status_code == 200 assert response.headers.get("content-type") == "text/csv; charset=utf-8" > assert "linkedin_group_members.csv" in response.headers.get("content-disposition", "") E AssertionError: assert 'linkedin_group_members.csv' in 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv' E + where 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv' = <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})>('content-disposition', '') E + where <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})> = Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}).get E + where Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=group_members.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}) = <Response [200 OK]>.headers

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'linkedin_people.csv' in 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv' + where 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv' = <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})>('content-disposition', '') + where <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})> = Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}).get + where Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}) = <Response [200 OK]>.headers

client = <starlette.testclient.TestClient object at 0x000001BE5CE2BCA0>
def test_download_people_csv(client): with patch("app.routers.people_scraper.get_driver") as mock_driver_cls, \ patch("app.routers.people_scraper.login_to_linkedin") as mock_login, \ patch("app.routers.people_scraper.scrape_people_logic") as mock_scrape, \ patch("app.routers.people_scraper.generate_csv_stream") as mock_csv:
mock_driver_cls.return_value.__enter__.return_value = MagicMock() mock_login.return_value = True mock_scrape.return_value = [] mock_csv.return_value = iter([b"col1\n", b"val1\n"])
response = client.get("/scraper/people/download?keywords=test&email=test@example.com&password=password")
assert response.status_code == 200 assert response.headers.get("content-type") == "text/csv; charset=utf-8" > assert "linkedin_people.csv" in response.headers.get("content-disposition", "") E AssertionError: assert 'linkedin_people.csv' in 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv' E + where 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv' = <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})>('content-disposition', '') E + where <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'})> = Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}).get E + where Headers({'content-disposition': 'attachment; filename=linkedin_people_test.csv', 'content-type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8'}) = <Response [200 OK]>.headers
tests\test_people_scraper.py:35: AssertionError
